items.title: IND vs AFG one-off Test: Rahul, Sudharsan take India to 96/1 at lunch
items.summary: India handed debut to left-arm spinner Manav Suthar, who has played 29 first-class matches for Rajasthan. He has 129 wickets from those matches
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The pioneer in an unlikely World Cup team
items.summary: When Desmond Armstrong faced the media at the World Cup in 1990, the first question he got was one that would stick in his mind for the wrong reasons.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Teenage star v 500-1 qualifier - a French Open final of contrasts
items.summary: Mirra Andreeva is a teenage star long predicted to win a Grand Slam title while Maja Chwalinska is a qualifier who came out of nowhere. On Saturday, they meet in the French Open...
